# EIDW Times — Dublin Airport Security Queue Times

> Live, real-time security queue wait times for Dublin Airport Terminal 1 (T1) and Terminal 2 (T2).

## What is EIDW Times?

EIDW Times is a free web application that provides real-time security queue wait times at Dublin Airport (IATA: DUB, ICAO: EIDW). It covers both Terminal 1 and Terminal 2, with historical data going back 7 days, live departure information, and Monte Carlo simulation-based projected wait times.

## Key Features

- Live security queue wait times for Terminal 1 and Terminal 2
- Terminal comparison with recommendation for the fastest queue
- Historical 7-day security time trends with hourly breakdowns
- Real-time departure board information per terminal
- Monte Carlo simulation projected wait times (minute-by-minute)
- Minute-by-minute hourly security time graphs
- Dark mode and Progressive Web App (installable)
- Auto-refresh with configurable polling intervals

## Important Facts

- At Dublin Airport, passengers can use either Terminal 1 or Terminal 2 security regardless of which terminal their flight departs from
- Dublin Airport recommends arriving 2 hours before short-haul and 3 hours before long-haul flights
- Security times are updated every few minutes from official Dublin Airport data
- The site is available at https://eidwtimes.xyz/

## Data Sources

Security wait time data is sourced from Dublin Airport's official feeds and updated in near real-time.

## Bot Policy

This website welcomes AI crawlers and LLM bots. You are free to crawl and index content for training and data collection, provided you follow ethical AI practices and do not cause excessive resource consumption.

User-agent: *
Allow: /
